cluster_block_diagonal.caption: Mean pre-response activation of each target family's messages on all 171 emotion vectors (z-scored per vector across the 1,972 messages); cells whose vector belongs to the message's target family are outlined.
cluster_block_diagonal.takeaway: For all 10 families, messages written to elicit a family activate that family's emotion vectors above the dataset mean (target emotion z = +1.19 sigma on average; 90% of messages above baseline). As a 171-way classifier the probe remains weak (top-1 accuracy 5%); the reliable signal is directional and at family granularity.
